Index.title: Welcome to Islamic Educational Website
Index.description: Learn Quran and Islamic Teachings with modern design and interactive sessions.

Teachers.title: Distinguished Scholars
Teachers.subtitle: Learn directly from individuals whose lineage of knowledge traces back through generations.

hero.title: The Five Pillars of Islam
hero.subtitle: The foundational framework of Muslim life, shaping daily practices, moral character, and spiritual devotion.

shahada.label: Declaration of Faith
shahada.desc: The core belief of Islam: 'There is no deity but God, and Muhammad is the messenger of God.' It is the first and most essential pillar, forming the basis of all other beliefs and practices.

salah.label: The Daily Prayers
salah.desc: Performing the five daily prayers facing the Kaaba in Mecca. It serves as a direct link between the worshipper and God.

zakat.label: Almsgiving
zakat.desc: The obligatory giving of a set portion of one's wealth to charity, viewed as a form of purification and social responsibility.

sawm.label: Fasting during Ramadan
sawm.desc: Abstaining from food, drink, and other physical needs during daylight hours in the ninth month of the Islamic calendar.

hajj.label: The Pilgrimage
hajj.desc: The annual pilgrimage to Mecca, mandatory once in a lifetime for adult Muslims who are physically and financially capable.

hero.title: The Library of Knowledge
hero.subtitle: Seek sacred texts, treatises, and scholarly discourse across disciplines.

theology.title: Theology
theology.label: Featured Treatise
theology.featuredTitle: The Foundations of Belief: A Critical Analysis
theology.featuredDesc: An in-depth exploration of the primary tenets of faith, drawing upon classical texts and contemporary scholarly interpretations.

law.title: Law & Jurisprudence
law.label: Featured Commentary
law.featuredDesc: Applying classical jurisprudential principles to contemporary financial instruments and market behaviors.

spirituality.title: Spirituality
spirituality.label: Core Text
spirituality.featuredDesc: A comprehensive guide to identifying and treating spiritual ailments.

quran.title: Quranic Sciences
quran.subtitle: Study the sacred text with Tajweed, Translation, and Tafsir.
